title: Dissolution of corporation
doc_html:
§290. Dissolution of corporation

            Upon dissolution of the corporation, all of the funds, property, both movable and immovable, and both tangible or intangible, assets, interests, rights, and all other property whatsoever, shall become owned by and shall inure to the benefit of the state.

            Acts 2025, No. 512, §1.
doc_text:
§290.  Dissolution of corporation
Upon dissolution of the corporation, all of the funds, property, both movable and
immovable, and both tangible or intangible, assets, interests, rights, and all other property
whatsoever, shall become owned by and shall inure to the benefit of the state.
Acts 2025, No. 512, §1.
